reason: Travis Bickle’s descent into urban paranoia is thick with surveillance and hidden threats.
Web of corruption and witness in New York, a stranger is someone you can’t trust.
Colonel’s mind-bending river mission haunted by covert listening posts and unseen watchers.
Jungle ambush shakes loyalties, every look feels like a wiretap waiting to be tripped.
Kaiser Soze’s myth is the ultimate system you can’t escape from once you glimpse its shadow.
New LA underbelly recordings reveal a state conspiracy you almost can’t unhear.
Online alter-ego draws deeper into a net of government tracking.
Billionaire’s game injects you into a system that won’t let you exit once you sign on.
Dread-cloaked messages and watched phone calls collapse your sense of reality.
Vindictive senator plotting in shadows, statute of secrecy seals every mouth.
